execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if string.len(current) > 0
      if first
        result = "#{current} #{current}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(current) > 0
  if first
    result = "#{current} #{current}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{current} #{current}"
  end
end

println(result)
